children.text: providing to school children environmental education opportunities relating to the conservation and management of migratory birds; and
increasing the capacity for schools, States, and other educational programs to conduct conservation and education programs.
conducting in all interested States the activities which on the day before , are conducted under the program known as the Junior Duck Stamp Conservation and Design Program;October 6, 1994
other activities authorized under the Program by this subchapter or any other Act; and
any other activity necessary to carry out the conservation and education goals of the Program.

children.heading: Effort to conduct Program in all States
children.label: c Effort to conduct Program in all States

children.heading: In general
children.label: 1 In general
children.text: The Secretary shall take appropriate steps to seek to conduct the Program in all of the States.

children.heading: Annual report
children.label: 2 Annual report
children.text: The Secretary shall annually submit a report to the Congress on the status of the Program in each of the States.
